articles.title: The Walt Disney Company $DIS Stock Holdings Decreased by Atwater Malick LLC
articles.summary: Atwater Malick LLC reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 28.1% in Q4, selling 10,087 shares and holding 25,858 shares valued at $2.94 million. Despite this, Wall Street sentiments lean positive with 18 analysts rating DIS a Buy and an average price target of $132.19. Disney recently exceeded Q1 earnings estimates, reporting $1.63 EPS on $25.98 billion revenue.
articles.text_to_analyze: The Walt Disney Company $DIS Stock Holdings Decreased by Atwater Malick LLC. Despite this, Wall Street sentiments lean positive with 18 analysts rating DIS a Buy and an average price target of $132.19. Disney recently exceeded Q1 earnings estimates, reporting $1.63 EPS on $25.98 billion revenue.

articles.title: Press Release: The Walt Disney Company Executives to Discuss Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results via Webcast
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Company announced that its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results webcast will be held on Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EDT/1:30 p.m. PDT. The webcast will feature a discussion of results by Disney's senior management and will include a Q&A session. Investors can access the webcast on the company's Investor Relations website.

articles.title: Webtoon Is Making New Platform
articles.summary: Webtoon Entertainment Inc. is launching "Canvas," its first international platform to consolidate regional services and enhance creator monetization. The platform will support seven languages and AI-powered translations, aiming to expand audience reach and foster global fan communities. This initiative follows fluctuating stock performance since its 2024 IPO and a slight increase in revenue driven by paid content and IP adaptations, including a partnership with Disney.

articles.title: The Walt Disney Company Executives To Discuss Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results Via Webcast
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE: DIS) announced it will host a live webcast to discuss its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results. The webcast is scheduled for Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET / 5:30 a.m. PT. Results and earnings materials will be released and posted on the company's investor relations website before trading opens on the same day.

articles.title: Disney reports quarterly results May 6 before market open
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Company (NYSE: DIS) will host a live webcast to discuss its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The company plans to release its earnings results and post related materials on its investor relations website before the market opens on that day. Interested parties can access the webcast and materials at www.disney.com/investors.
